\tzpentry{ID4176}{Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4176 introduces Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \rho_{\Lambda} = \lim_{t\to\infty} \frac{1}{t}\int_0^t \rho_{\text{vac}...,math_methods,Vacuum} The cosmological constant problem finds natural resolution through accumulated vacuum fluctuations reaching equilibrium: \begin{equation} \rho_{\Lambda} = \lim_{t\to\infty} \frac{1}{t}\int_0^t \rho_{\text{vac}}(\tau) e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{cosmic}}} d\tau = \frac{3c^4}{8\pi G}\Lambda_{\text{obs}} \end{equation}
